caption: A person is crafting birthday cards on a light-colored gridded cutting mat. On the workspace, there are various pieces of floral and brick-patterned scrapbook paper, a small white card with the text "Wishing your BIRTHDAY is filled with ALL THE best things!", and crafting tools including a tape runner and a small red stamp. In the first two frames, the person's left hand, wearing a gold ring, holds down several rectangles of floral and brick-patterned paper arranged side-by-side. In the bottom two frames, the hand shifts position to press down on a different set of paper rectangles. Overlaid white text appears in the final frame, reading "BLOOM WHERE YOU'RE PLANTED CO" and "12" X 12" DESIGNER SERIES PAPER". The scene remains static except for the movement of the hand and the appearance of the on-screen text.
